# uptimekuma_notification_onebot (Resource)

OneBot notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_onebot" "group_message" {
  name         = "OneBot Group Notification"
  http_addr    = "http://localhost:5700"
  access_token = "your-access-token"
  msg_type     = "group"
  receiver_id  = "123456789"
  is_active    = true
  is_default   = false
}

resource "uptimekuma_notification_onebot" "private_message" {
  name         = "OneBot Private Notification"
  http_addr    = "http://localhost:5700"
  access_token = "your-access-token"
  msg_type     = "private"
  receiver_id  = "987654321"
  is_active    = true
  is_default   = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `http_addr` (String) HTTP address of the OneBot service (e.g., `http://localhost:5700`).
- `msg_type` (String) Message type: `group` for group messages or `private` for private messages.
- `name` (String) Notification name
- `receiver_id` (String) QQ group ID (when `msg_type` is `group`) or user ID (when `msg_type` is `private`).

### Optional

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) Access token for authentication with the OneBot service.
- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
